deployment_commands.value:
# Connect to the server:
ssh -i sentinel-key.pem ubuntu@34.200.160.84

# Check deployment logs:
sudo journalctl -u sentinel -f

# View Docker containers:
docker ps

# Check API health:
curl http://34.200.160.84/health

# View post-deployment status:
./scripts/deploy.sh --status

grafana_url.value: Grafana not available without RDS enabled

next_steps.value:
1. Configure DNS: Point your domain to 34.200.160.84
2. Add SSL: Run ./scripts/setup-ssl.sh on the server
3. Set up backups: Configure ./scripts/backup.sh
4. Verify API: curl http://34.200.160.84/health
